SEARCH
Package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.tile

Class Tile<M extends Machine>

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.tile.Tile<M>
Type Parameters:
M - Type of machine connected to this tile
Direct Known Subclasses:
FurnaceTile
public abstract class Tile<M extends Machine> extends Object
A tile that connects a tickable Machine to a Block

    • blockDataMatches

      public boolean blockDataMatches(@NotNull @NotNull Block block)
      Check if the BlockData of a block matches the BlockData of this tile
      Parameters:
      block - Block to check data for
      Returns:
      True if BlockData matches

    • activate

      public void activate(@NotNull @NotNull Player player)
      Activate this tile for a player

      In the case of a machine it will open the inventory to the player

      Parameters:
      player - Player to activate this tile for

    • breakTile

      public void breakTile()
      Break this tile

      This is run when a player breaks the block connected to this tile. The tile will be removed and no longer tick.

    • tick

      public void tick()
      Tick this tile
